description: H.M.D. Dinesha Kumari Herath Vs W.R.A.N.S. Wijayasinghe, The Registrar General, and Others before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: H.M.D. Dinesha Kumari Herath Vs W.R.A.N.S. Wijayasinghe, The Registrar General, and Others
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: A Deed of Gift was submitted for registration on behalf of the Petitioner’s child; however, the Land Registrar refused to register the same as there was a pending case relating to the land in suit, alleged to be based on fraud. The original copy had been handed over to the Magistrate’s Court of Kandy and SCID. Appeal to the Registrar General was turned down, and this Court in this Writ Application compelling the Registrar General to return the said deed, was dismissed on the basis that the Registrar’s actions were justified.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
